bugs.title: Role showing N/A instead of Candidate
bugs.description: Role field displaying N/A instead of actual role name. Debug td_user_role parameter flow.

bugs.title: Operators landing page corrupted to 1 byte
bugs.description: Page content corrupted to single dash character. Restored from operators-9.html backup (17,555 bytes).

bugs.title: Empty NEW and ALL tabs in Operator Actions
bugs.description: Database column mismatch - code used requested_role (doesn't exist) and td_candidate (wrong prefix). Fixed to use role column with candidate/employer values.

bugs.title: Missing footer icons in Operator Actions
bugs.description: First 3 footer badges showing placeholder text (??, ?). Replaced paragraph blocks with HTML img blocks.

Tab statistics with correct WHERE clauses

completed_fixes.name: operator_actions_empty_tabs
completed_fixes.description: Fixed empty NEW and ALL tabs caused by database column/value mismatch in operator-actions-display.php
completed_fixes.root_cause: Code used requested_role (non-existent column) and td_candidate/td_employer (wrong value prefix)
completed_fixes.solution: Changed to role IN ('candidate', 'employer') matching actual database schema
completed_fixes.result: All tabs now populate correctly with public user registration requests

completed_fixes.name: operator_actions_footer_icons
completed_fixes.description: Fixed missing footer icons in Operator Actions page (first 3 badges showed ??, ?)
completed_fixes.root_cause: Used paragraph blocks instead of HTML img blocks
completed_fixes.solution: Replaced 3 paragraph blocks with HTML blocks containing img tags
completed_fixes.result: All 4 footer badges now display correctly

description: Candidate registration (PENG-017) completed and deployed. Operator workflow complete: Operators Landing Page (PENG-073) and Operator Actions Page (PENG-072) with tab filtering, database fixes, and approval workflow tested. Three critical bugs fixed (page corruption, empty tabs, missing icons). Footer SVG icons deployed across all landing pages.
notes: Candidate registration (PENG-017): Basic version working, needs role parameter bug fix (BUG-001)
Operator workflow COMPLETE (Feb 26): Landing page (ID 25) + Actions page (ID 49) with tab filtering
PENG-072: operator-actions-display.php (555 lines) with database column fixes applied
PENG-073: Operators landing page restored from corruption, enhanced with clickable tiles
Critical fixes: Database column mismatch (requested_role → role), footer icons (paragraphs → HTML img blocks), CTA spacing
Approval workflow tested by user and confirmed working end-to-end
Footer SVG icons: Already deployed and verified on production (Feb 24)
Clean separation: Operators see public users (candidate, employer), Managers see all users
Ready for production deployment: All local testing complete
